## Knowledge Base Results for "fastframe"

### SCPI Commands
- **STATE** (public/commands/MSO_DPO_5k_7k_70K.json)
  Command: HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE Description: This command sets or queries the state of FastFrame acquisition. This is equivalent to setting FastFr
- **FASTframe** (public/commands/MSO_DPO_5k_7k_70K.json)
  Command: HORizontal:FASTframe? Description: This query-only command returns all of the settings for the horizontal FastFrame commands. Category: Horiz
- **SOUrce** (public/commands/MSO_DPO_5k_7k_70K.json)
  Command: HORizontal:FASTframe:REF:SOUrce Description: This command sets or queries FastFrame Reference waveform source. This is equivalent to selectin

### PyVISA/TekHSI
- **When to Use TekHSI — FastFrame, FastAcq, Bulk Waveform Transfer** (AI_RAG/corpus/pyvisa_tekhsi/pyvisa_tekhsi_index.json)
  Use TekHSI ONLY when: 1) FastFrame mode — need to capture and transfer many frames quickly, 2) FastAcq mode — high-speed continuous acquisition, 3) Bu
- **TekHSI: Only for Waveform Data — FastFrame/FastAcq Only** (AI_RAG/corpus/pyvisa_tekhsi/pyvisa_tekhsi_index.json)
  TekHSI is exclusively for high-speed waveform data transfer. It uses gRPC on port 5000. ONLY supported on MSO5/6, MSO5B/6B, DPO7K. NOT supported on DP
